findings.body: Top-level sourceHead is inconsistent with the most recent repair attempt; verify whether it should represent the original review target or latest repaired state.
Metadata is ambiguous about whether source_head refers to the reviewed commit or repaired commit; add a clear repair_commit field or document the source_head rule.
bootstrap_gaps uses a list containing none while related JSON artifacts use an empty array; normalize or document the semantic difference.
Policy validation fails open when artifact_types or trust-signal requirements are missing; enforce required artifact_types and trust signals fail-closed.
reviewEvidencePath and landingVerdictPath existence checks are duplicated between readStaleEvidence and buildCockpitTrustSignals; compute them once or return the flags.
validateDerivedProjectionRules should enforce both propagate_missing_or_stale_dependencies and cannot_upgrade_missing_dependency_to_trusted as true.

attempts.summary: CodeRabbit completed the focused BANDIT-056 Stage 3 delta review and returned two trivial open findings against focused session-context pathExists sequencing and review_subject_hash source_identity metadata.
Codex PM locally repaired both prior CodeRabbit findings. Provider evidence was intentionally stale until focused CodeRabbit refresh on the repaired source.

Focused CodeRabbit refresh completed on the repaired source and returned five open findings: one major stale-freshness trust-signal issue, three minor validation/template normalization issues, and one trivial cockpit-status helper extraction issue.

Codex PM locally repaired all five focused CodeRabbit findings with regression coverage and adjacent projection verification. Provider evidence is intentionally stale until focused CodeRabbit refresh runs on the repaired source.

Focused CodeRabbit refresh completed on the locally repaired source and returned four open findings: two minor evidence-freshness/test normalization findings and two trivial readability/I/O hardening findings.
Codex PM locally repaired all four focused CodeRabbit findings. Provider evidence is intentionally stale until focused CodeRabbit refresh runs on the repaired source.

Focused CodeRabbit refresh completed on the locally repaired source and returned two open findings: one minor evidence-metadata sourceHead placeholder issue and one trivial buildGateTrustSignal documentation issue.

Focused CodeRabbit refresh completed on the locally repaired source and returned two open findings: one trivial focused-session-context stage evidence mapping duplication issue and one minor session-context stale review evidence parity coverage issue.
Codex PM locally repaired both focused CodeRabbit findings. Provider evidence is intentionally stale until focused CodeRabbit refresh runs on the repaired source.

Focused CodeRabbit refresh completed on the locally repaired source and returned three trivial open findings: one implementation-evidence template-field wording issue and two shared evidence-trust-signal helper duplication issues.
Codex PM locally repaired all three focused CodeRabbit findings. Provider evidence is intentionally stale until focused CodeRabbit refresh runs on the repaired source.
Focused CodeRabbit refresh completed on the locally repaired source and returned seven open findings: six minor artifact/policy/template findings and one trivial cockpit-status I/O hardening finding.
